fixtures._comment: gen-ui-open-advanced — 'Inline expression evaluator' pill, 1st leg: emit generateSandboxedUi (sandbox='allow-scripts') the D5 assertion probes for. sequenceIndex:0 gates it to the first match — Strands mints UUID tool ids so the toolCallId follow-up below can't match, and hasToolResult flips true after the tool runs; sequenceIndex is invariant to both, so the bare-userMessage content leg cleanly catches the follow-up turn.

toolCalls.name: generateSandboxedUi
toolCalls.arguments:
{"initialHeight":300,"placeholderMessages":["Building expression evaluator…"],"css":"body{margin:0;font-family:monospace;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;padding:16px}.wrap{max-width:320px;margin:0 auto}input{width:100%;padding:10px;background:#1e293b;border:1px solid #334155;border-radius:6px;color:#e2e8f0;font-family:monospace;font-size:14px;box-sizing:border-box}input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#3b82f6}.result{margin-top:12px;padding:12px;background:#1e293b;border-radius:6px;min-height:24px;font-size:16px}.label{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;margin-bottom:4px}","html":"
Expression
Result
—
","jsFunctions":"(function(){var input=document.getElementById('expr');var result=document.getElementById('res');input.addEventListener('input',async function(){var val=input.value.trim();if(!val){result.textContent='—';return;}try{var r=await Websandbox.connection.remote.evaluateExpression({expression:val});if(r&&r.ok){result.textContent=String(r.value);}else{result.textContent='err';}}catch(e){result.textContent='err';}});})();"}

fixtures._comment: gen-ui-open-advanced — 'Inline expression evaluator' pill, 2nd leg: follow-up content after the iframe renders (sequenceIndex:0 exhausted).

response.content: Expression evaluator rendered above — type any arithmetic expression and the result updates live via the sandboxed evaluation bridge.
